name: corcept_hook_posttool_audit
title: Corcept Hook: PostToolUse Audit
description: Append a corcept.event.tool_use.v1 row to the hash-chained ledger after a tool call. Authority: Mutate. Trust ceiling: Signed. Pass the hook event JSON in the hook_input argument; ledger writes are confined to .corcept/ledger/.

hook_input.description: Claude Code hook event JSON (the payload the CLI would otherwise read from stdin). When omitted, the CLI falls back to reading stdin.
